characters.name: Junior.
characters.description: Full NameKenneth Walter Davis Jr.Nickname(s)JuniorFamilyKen Davis(father)Isabelle Matiya Ferris(mother)Dani Davis(half-sister)Kris Furillo(wife)name unknown(father-in-law)Barb Furillo(mother-in-law)Jace Furillo(brother-in-law)RomancesKris Furillo(wife)Laura Nichols(ex-fiance)Rebecca(ex-girlfriend)Gillian Parsons(briefly dated)FriendsKris FurilloMatt RitterDani DavisR.J. BlakeStatusAliveFirst appearancePilotLast appearanceThe Ties That Bind: Part IIPortrayed byRyan Sypek  Junior is the son of Ken Davis and Isabelle Matiya Ferris, and Dani's older half-brother. Junior is very indecisive young man, he has gotten into gambling, owned a night club (which he lost in a bet with his former bookie, Bobby), dabbled in the sport of professional bull riding, and been involved on and off in the running of Davis Farms throughout the series. At one point he sold most of his shares to Gillian and regretted it. Even though Junior tries his hardest to break away from the "rich kid" stereotype, he loves his Porsche convertible. Junior spent most of the series in an on-again, off-again relationship with Kris, he was going to get married and left last minute to confess his love for kris, eventually marrying her in the series finale. characters.name: Kris
characters.description: Full NameKristine Furillo DavisNickname(s)KrisOccupationJockeyFamilyname unknown(father)Barb Furillo(mother)Jace Furillo(brother)Junior Davis(husband)Ken Davis(father-in-law)Marisol deEsquvala(mother-in-law)Dani Davis(half-sister-in-law)RomancesJunior Davis(husband)Matt Ritter(Friend/ex-Boyfriend)Kerry Connelly(ex-Boyfriend)FriendsWildfireJunior DavisDani DavisMatt RitterJean RitterPablo BetartTodd RitterStatusAliveFirst appearancePilotLast appearanceThe Ties That Bind: Part IIPortrayed byGenevieve Cortese PadaleckiKris Furilloof "Wildfire". She is portrayed byGenevieve Cortese/Padalecki. Barb Furillo(mother)Jace Furillo(brother)Junior Davis(husband)Ken Davis(father-in-law)Marisol deEsquvala(mother-in-law)Dani Davis(half-sister-in-law) Kris is an 18-year-old woman who was given a second chance by Pablo Betart after spending 18 months in Camp LaGrange, a women's correctional facility, for grand theft auto and resisting arrest. After seeing her connection with horses, particularly a police horse named WildFire, Pablo offers her a job to work at Raintree as a ranch hand. He struggles to adapt to life outside Camp LaGrange at first but eventually becomes closer with the Ritter family and various other characters. At Camp LaGrange she meets Jean Ritter and Henry Ritter, mother-father Co-Owners of Raintree as well as their sons, Matt and Todd Ritter. She also meets Junior Davis, Matt's best friend and his sister, Dani Davis who Matt dated briefly in the series. Kris is an 18-year-old woman who was given a second chance by Pablo Betart after spending 18 months in Camp LaGrange, a women's correctional facility, for grand theft auto and resisting arrest. After seeing her connection with horses, particularly a police horse named WildFire, Pablo offers her a job to work at Raintree as a ranch hand. He struggles to adapt to life outside Camp LaGrange at first but eventually becomes closer with the Ritter family and various other characters. At Camp LaGrange she meets Jean Ritter and Henry Ritter, mother-father Co-Owners of Raintree as well as their sons, Matt and Todd Ritter. She also meets Junior Davis, Matt's best friend and his sister, Dani Davis who Matt dated briefly in the series. Kris is a horse jockey who formerly served time atCamp LaGrange, a correctional facility, for grand theft auto. There she met Pablo, who would later take her in as a ranch hand. She shares a special bond withWildfire, a horse she saved from going to slaughter and helped turn into a champion racehorse. In series 2, she was involved with her agent, Kerry Connelly, until he stole from the Raintree Farms and slept with his ex-girlfriend Gillian. Kris spent most of the show in an on-and-off relationship with Junior Davis, until she pursued a brief but passionate fling with Matt Ritter in season 3. She then married Junior in the series finale.

She then married Junior in the series finale.
